summary:
Claim: Rhinomanometry is the gold standard for evaluating nasal obstruction due to its ability to objectively measure airflow dynamics.  
Evidence: - Provides quantitative, real-time data on nasal airway resistance and patency. - Enables dynamic assessment under varying clinical conditions (e.g., pre/post-surgery).  
Answer: C

Answer: C. Answer choice: C
